channel.title: Building & Construction Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in Building & Construction Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO Animal Crossing Isabelle’s House Visit Creative Building Toy for 6 Plus Year Old Kids Girls & Boys Includes 2 Minifigures from the Video Game Series Including Fauna Birthday Gift Idea 77049
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Animal Crossing Isabelle’s House Visit Creative Building Toy for 6 Plus Year Old Kids Girls & Boys Includes 2 Minifigures from the Video Game Series Including Fauna Birthday Gift Idea 77049 at the following link: ℹ️: Building toy for kids – Comes with lots of accessories and modular baseplates so kids can experiment and change up the look of the LEGO house Hands-on play for video game fans – These LEGO sets allow kids to keep using their creativity and storytelling skills to explore the world of Animal Crossing, even when on a screen break Creative building toy for 6+ year old girls and boys – LEGO Animal Crossing Isabelle’s House Visit gives kids hours of hands-on role play Animal Crossing gift – This set makes a fun birthday gift for 6+ year old girls, boys and kids who love group or solo play that gives fans of the Animal Crossing video game series hours of customisation and role-play fun Play starters – This LEGO house includes 2 minifigures, Isabelle and Fauna, plus features such as the workbench and flying present-carrying balloon Sets for storytellers – LEGO Animal Crossing toys give kids the creative freedom to customise scenes to create new stories with the characters Digital building instructions – The LEGO Builder app features a digital version of the building instructions included with this set 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 75954 Harry Potter Hogwarts Great Hall Castle Toy Gift Idea for Wizarding World Fan Building Set for Kids
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 75954 Harry Potter Hogwarts Great Hall Castle Toy Gift Idea for Wizarding World Fan Building Set for Kids here: ℹ️: This Hogwarts Castles Great Hall toy is a great birthday or Christmas Harry Potter Gift for kids who love the Wizarding World adventures! Includes 10 minifigures: Harry Potter, Ron Weasley, Hermione Granger, Draco Malfoy, Susan Bones, Professor McGonagall, and Albus Dumbledore This castles toy for kids 4-level tower features movable Grand Staircase spiral steps at its base, potions room, treasure room with chest Also includes Professor Quirrell with dual Lord Voldemort face, Hagrid, Nearly Headless Nick, buildable Basilisk plus Hedwig & Scabbers figures The castles turret features the Mirror of Erised with changeable pictures and roosting spot for Fawkes figure Accessory elements include 7 wands, 3 tumblers, an umbrella, lantern, broom, sorting hat, cauldrons, potions, candles, brooms and many more Features Hogwarts Castles Great Hall with house banners, tower with movable spiral staircase, potions room and treasure room!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Tantive IV Set Collectible 25th Anniversary Starship Model Kit for Adults to Build Iconic Vehicle from A New Hope Memorabilia Home Office Décor Gifts for Men Women & Fans 75376
item.description: You can find LEGO Star Wars Tantive IV Set Collectible 25th Anniversary Starship Model Kit for Adults to Build Iconic Vehicle from A New Hope Memorabilia Home Office Décor Gifts for Men Women & Fans 75376 with a discount here: ℹ️: Star Wars gift for fans and memorabilia collectors – This 654-piece adults’ LEGO Star Wars model kit makes a fun birthday gift for men, women, him or her and a great addition to any LEGO Star Wars collection LEGO Star Wars Starship Collection – This LEGO set for adults is part of a collectible series featuring mid-scale Star Wars model starships Collectible Star Wars vehicle model – Recreate the opening scene of Star Wars: A New Hope with this LEGO Star Wars Tantive IV set for adults Authentically detailed Star Wars vehicle – Capture features of the Tantive IV, as seen in Star Wars: A New Hope, including 11 engines and turbolasers Made for display – The buildable stand has a nameplate and LEGO Star Wars 25th anniversary brick, making it a great home or office décor piece Build your LEGO Star Wars starship with digital guidance – With the LEGO Builder app you can build in 3D, track your progress and save all your sets 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Technic Bugatti Bolide Racing Car Model Building Set Race Engineering Toys Collectible Iconic Sports Vehicle Construction Kit for 9 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls 42151
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic Bugatti Bolide Racing Car Model Building Set Race Engineering Toys Collectible Iconic Sports Vehicle Construction Kit for 9 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls 42151 here: ℹ️: Motorsport fans and race car enthusiasts can explore the stunning design of the Bugatti Bolide with this LEGO Technic model race car building kit With realistic movement and authentic features based on the original car model, the build features a working W16 engine, steering and scissor doors With yellow and black colour theme and sticker detail that adds the finishing touch, this toy car model looks great on display in kids’ rooms The Bugatti Bolide stretches the possibilities of motorsport technology; let your kids build this LEGO Technic model of the iconic racing car This LEGO Technic Bugatti Bolide car toy model building set makes a great Christmas gift for boys and girls aged 9 plus and helps to introduce kids to engineering 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Speed Champions 2 Fast 2 Furious Nissan Skyline GT-R R34 Set Race Car Toy Model Building Kit for 9 Plus Year Old Boys & Girls with Racer Minifigure Collectible Gift for Kids 76917
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Speed Champions 2 Fast 2 Furious Nissan Skyline GT-R R34 Set Race Car Toy Model Building Kit for 9 Plus Year Old Boys & Girls with Racer Minifigure Collectible Gift for Kids 76917 at the following link: ℹ️: Fast and Furious fans can relive thrilling moments from the 2 Fast 2 Furious movie with this LEGO Nissan Skyline GT-R (R34) model car building kit This LEGO Speed Champions collectible model car building kit for kids provides children with an awesome introduction to the world of engineering Inspired by the real-life version, the toy race car model features iconic stripes on the side, a wing at the back and a grille on the front This ultra-sleek LEGO Speed Champions 2023 set includes a Brian O’Conner minifigure for kids to place behind the wheel of the race car model Car lovers can experience a rewarding build before proudly displaying this collectible toy car or recreating epic racing scenes from the movie Fans of the epic movie franchise will love this model car building kit as a Fast and Furious themed birthday gift for 9-plus-year-old boys and girls LEGO Speed Champions and Fast and Furious fans will appreciate the impressive wheel arches and the nitro fuel canister on the passenger seat 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 60197 City Passenger Train RC Set Toy for Kids with Battery Powered Engine Remote Control Bluetooth Connection Railway Tracks & Accessories
item.description: You can find LEGO 60197 City Passenger Train RC Set Toy for Kids with Battery Powered Engine Remote Control Bluetooth Connection Railway Tracks & Accessories with a discount here: ℹ️: Accessory elements include 3 mugs, 3 muffins, a hot dog, croissant, messenger bag and a suitcase with LEGO box inside The included Bluetooth remote is not compatible with older infrared remote-controlled LEGO train sets This product requires batteries (not included). Please refer to the product packaging for types and quantities Operate the train with the 10-speed Bluetooth remote control Drive to the platform and pick up or unload passengers Set the rails in different ways to fit your city&039;s style Features a motorised engine with 10-speed Bluetooth remote control and opening nose cone, pantograph on the roof and driver’s cabin with opening window and control panel, plus a café car with removable roof and tables, and a passenger car with removable roof, seats and tables Includes 4 LEGO minifigures: 2 passengers, a train conductor and a train attendant Lift off the roof to access the passenger train cabins filled with cool details Also includes a platform with 2 seats and train services map, a full circular track with 16 curved rails and 4 straight rails, plus a buildable train signal pole 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO 60266 City Oceans Ocean Exploration Ship
item.description: You can find LEGO 60266 City Oceans Ocean Exploration Ship with a discount here: ℹ️: Ocean Exploration Ship Number of pieces: 745 Includes a team of 8 explorers with LEGO City Adventures TV series hero Harl Hubbs minifigure, stingray and shark figures, plus accessories Manufacturer recommended age: 7+ This multi-vehicle toy also includes a research submarine and helicopter toys, speedboat, shark cage and pirate shipwreck with hidden treasure 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Super Mario Peach’s Castle Expansion Set Buildable Game Toys Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys Aged 8 Plus with Time Block and Figures to Combine with Starter Course 71408
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Super Mario Peach’s Castle Expansion Set Buildable Game Toys Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys Aged 8 Plus with Time Block and Figures to Combine with Starter Course 71408 at the following link: ℹ️: This modular set - compatible with other LEGO Super Mario sets - requires a LEGO Super Mario starter course (71360, 71387 or 71403) for interactive play This set makes a fun Super Mario-themed birthday present or gift for kids, girls and boys aged 8 plus years old and all fans of LEGO Super Mario building toys Also includes a Special Pipe: Peachs Castle, broken bridge and 5 LEGO Super Mario figures – Bowser, Ludwig, Toadette, a Goomba and a Bob-omb Kids can expand their LEGO Super Mario world with this challenge-packed Princess Peach Castle Expansion Set featuring a castle toy and 5 LEGO Super Mario characters The LEGO Super Mario companion app offers instructions and more ideas: visit LEGO.

item.title: LEGO Star Wars Darth Vader Mech Buildable Action Figure Model with Jointed Parts Minifigure Cockpit and Large Red Lightsaber Collectible Toy for Kids Boys Girls Aged 6 and Up 75368
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Star Wars Darth Vader Mech Buildable Action Figure Model with Jointed Parts Minifigure Cockpit and Large Red Lightsaber Collectible Toy for Kids Boys Girls Aged 6 and Up 75368 at the following link: ℹ️: Makes an out-of-this-world Star Wars gift for boys, girls and all fans aged 6 plus years old, this LEGO Star Wars set is designed to be easy to build so the action play starts fast The Star Wars figure is a great size for play on the go, and fantastic on display in kids bedrooms between playtime adventures This LEGO Star Wars mech can be combined with the 75369 Boba Fett Mech and 75370 Stormtrooper Mech LEGO Star Wars collectible sets (sold separately) LEGO Star Wars Darth Vader Mech building toy for kids aged 6+ years old features a buildable action figure of the iconic Star Wars character The large Star Wars buildable toy figure has posable limbs, opening cockpit, gripping hands that hold a large red lightsaber, and a lightsaber clip Includes a Darth Vader LEGO minifigure with smaller lightsaber for kids to place into the cockpit of the action figure to begin battles 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO DUPLO | Disney Ariel’s Magical Underwater Palace The Little Mermaid Building Toy for 2 Plus Year Old Toddlers Girls & Boys Castle Set with Figures Educational Learning Toys Gift Idea 10435
item.description: You can find LEGO DUPLO | Disney Ariel’s Magical Underwater Palace The Little Mermaid Building Toy for 2 Plus Year Old Toddlers Girls & Boys Castle Set with Figures Educational Learning Toys Gift Idea 10435 with a discount here: ℹ️: Buildable castle toy home of Ariel – Toddlers enjoy undersea construction fun with the LEGO DUPLO | Disney Ariel’s Magical Underwater Palace Toddler learning toys – Kids hone their fine motor skills using fun functions such as the spinning buildable toy dancefloor and the movable swing 3 familiar characters – kids explore the castle from the Disney Junior Ariel TV show with LEGO DUPLO | Disney figures of Ariel, Fernie and Sebastian Educational toy for toddlers – LEGO DUPLO | Disney building toys support emotional and developmental learning through fun-filled, creative playtimes Lots of accessories – In the bedroom, ballroom and play area are elements to spark stories, such as a brush, camera, guitar, pitcher and plate A treat for Little Mermaid fans – This colourful building toy is a fun Disney-themed gift for 2-plus-year-old girls, boys and for toddlers who love role-play toys and the Disney Junior Ariel TV show 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars AT-AT 75288 Building Kit Fun Building Toy Playset for Kids to Role-Play Exciting Missions in the Star Wars Universe and Recreate Classic Star Wars Trilogy Scenes 1 267 Pieces
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Star Wars AT-AT 75288 Building Kit Fun Building Toy Playset for Kids to Role-Play Exciting Missions in the Star Wars Universe and Recreate Classic Star Wars Trilogy Scenes 1 267 Pieces here: ℹ️: The Star Wars AT-AT figure features posable legs, a posable head with opening cockpit for 3 minifigures and spring-loaded shooters Celebrate the iconic series with this Star Wars 40th Anniversary set, a LEGO brick version of the iconic AT-AT Walker Star Wars building toy This iconic AT-AT Walker also has foldout panels, a speeder bike, winch and bottom hatch so Luke can throw in the thermal detonator element Includes 6 LEGO Star Wars minifigures – Luke Skywalker, General Veers, 2 AT-AT Drivers and 2 Snowtroopers, all with weapons This set will impress for sure when put on display, and it makes a fantastic LEGO Star Wars gift for kids, boys and girls aged 10 plus 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Animal Crossing Kapp’n’s Island Boat Tour Buildable Creative Toy for 6 Plus Year Old Kids Girls & Boys Features 2 Minifigures from the Video Game Series Including Marshal Birthday Gift 77048
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Animal Crossing Kapp’n’s Island Boat Tour Buildable Creative Toy for 6 Plus Year Old Kids Girls & Boys Features 2 Minifigures from the Video Game Series Including Marshal Birthday Gift 77048 at the following link: ℹ️: Animal Crossing birthday gift idea – This LEGO building set makes a fun gift for 6-plus-year-old girls, boys and kids who love the video game series as well as imaginative play More creative activities – Kids who love independent play can also ride in Kapp’n’s boat toy, fish with a fishing rod or catch a hermit crab Video game-inspired toy – LEGO Animal Crossing Kapp’n’s Island Boat Tour toy transports girls and boys aged 6+ to a scene from the video game series Build the fun – Add to other LEGO Animal Crossing building toys (sold separately) to expand a child’s brick-built island community Familiar settings and characters – Includes a customisable scene and 2 characters: a Marshal squirrel minifigure and Kapp’n turtle minifigure Activity-packed Animal Crossing toy – Just like in the Animal Crossing video game series, kids can dig for Bells, pick coconuts and collect bamboo Buildable scenes, limitless customisation – Kids use their creative skills to arrange the LEGO baseplates and accessories to create all-new stories 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Speed Champions McLaren Solus GT & McLaren F1 LM Set 2 Iconic Race Car Toys for 9 Plus Year Old Boys & Girls Hypercar Model Building Kit Collectible Gift for Kids 76918
item.description: You can find LEGO Speed Champions McLaren Solus GT & McLaren F1 LM Set 2 Iconic Race Car Toys for 9 Plus Year Old Boys & Girls Hypercar Model Building Kit Collectible Gift for Kids 76918 with a discount here: ℹ️: The McLaren F1 LM race car toy features its distinctive papaya orange colour with a central driving seat and cooling ducts on both sides Perfect for setting up high-speed races, the model car building kit also includes 2 driver minifigures - 1 to drive each of the car toys This double-pack LEGO Speed Champions set features 2 buildable replica toy car models; McLaren Solus GT and McLaren F1 LM to build and display Kids can enjoy a rewarding build with the classic F1 LM and modern Solus GT replica model cars before proudly racing and displaying them This LEGO Speed Champions set featuring 2 iconic McLaren model cars, makes a great gift for 9-plus-year-old boys and girls who love cool LEGO vehicles The Solus GT toy car model also includes details from the real version: white, black and orange colour scheme, prominent wheel arches and cockpit The world of racing awaits sports car lovers with other LEGO Speed Champions sets like Ferrari 812 Competizione (76914) and Porsche 963 (76916) 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Friends Paisley s House Dolls House Toy for Girls and Boys 4 Plus Years Old Playset with Accessories Birthday Gift Idea 2023 Series Characters 41724
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Paisley s House Dolls House Toy for Girls and Boys 4 Plus Years Old Playset with Accessories Birthday Gift Idea 2023 Series Characters 41724 at the following link: ℹ️: Features a 2-storey dolls house toy for kids aged 4 with removable top floor and lots of accessories, plus Paisley, Ella and Jonathan mini-dolls This LEGO 4 set includes dolls house accessories: a brush, a guitar, kitchen utensils, food and more so children can invent their own stories After exploring the house, kids can join Paisley in the garden where she loves to compose music on her guitar and say hello to pet bunny Melody The set features a starter brick for quick building plus instructions via the LEGO Builder app with tools to zoom and rotate models in 3D Includes 3 LEGO mini-dolls: Paisley, a shy girl who loves music, Ella and Jonathan, part of the new generation of LEGO Friends 2023 characters A great birthday gift idea or a special treat for kids aged 4 plus years old who love dolls houses and imaginative play with creative toys This toy dolls house has rooms on the upper floor that can be separated, plus a cosy outdoor area with a hutch for the pet bunny figure 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO City Express Passenger Train Set Remote Controlled Toy Gifts for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls with Working Headlights 2 Coaches and 24 Track Pieces Plus 6 Minifigures 60337
item.description: You’ve got LEGO City Express Passenger Train Set Remote Controlled Toy Gifts for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls with Working Headlights 2 Coaches and 24 Track Pieces Plus 6 Minifigures 60337 at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO city train set features a remote control bullet locomotive train toy with working, dimmable headlights and LEGO Powered Up technology Includes 6 LEGO minifigures: 4 passengers, train driver, restaurant worker, plus bike and helmet, wheelchair, briefcase and backpack accessories The train and its dimmable lights can be controlled via the included remote control or a smart device equipped with the LEGO Powered Up App LEGO City Express toy train set is an exciting birthday gift for kids, boys and girls age 7 plus and any fan of remote control trains and cars This LEGO train set comes with step-by-step instructions for each model, so kids can learn to build the remote control train with confidence Kids can role-play cool scenarios: wait at the platform, board the restaurant car for a toy hotdog or hop on the passenger coach with laptop This train toy for kids includes a train with a restaurant car, passenger coach, station platform, 24 track pieces and 6 minifigures 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Technic 42111 La Dodge Charger de Dom Maquette Voiture de Course a Construire Fast and Furious Idée Cadeau
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Technic 42111 La Dodge Charger de Dom Maquette Voiture de Course a Construire Fast and Furious Idée Cadeau at the following link: ℹ️: Number of Pieces: 1,077 Check out the V8 engine, plus two nitro bottles for extra power. If things get too hot, there’s a fire extinguisher in the cockpit Authentic features let fans recreate the thrill of driving the real car, with moving pistons, suspension, steering system and air blower Makes the ideal gift for any car, Fast & Furious enthusiast, boy, girl man or woman; perfectly sized to create an awesome display piece to show off Dom’s Dodge Charger race car is an awesome replica model of the classic muscle car, inspired by the original 1970 Dodge Charger R/T Re-enact Dominic Toretto’s cool stunts from The Fast and The Furious movies then display the car in the famous wheelstand position 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 10313 Icons Wildflower Bouquet Set Artificial Flowers with Poppies and Lavender Crafts for Adults Home Décor Gifts for Women Men Her & Him Botanical Collection
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 10313 Icons Wildflower Bouquet Set Artificial Flowers with Poppies and Lavender Crafts for Adults Home Décor Gifts for Women Men Her & Him Botanical Collection here: ℹ️: Number of Pieces: 939 Part of the LEGO Botanical Collection, this set includes elements made of plant-based plastic, produced from sustainably sourced sugar cane Features 16 stems with a mix of flowers: cornflower, lavender, Welsh poppies, cow parsley, leatherleaf ferns, gerbera daisies, larkspur and lupins Put a creative spin on a timeless gesture with this LEGO flowers set, perfect as surprise gift for a loved one, anniversary present for wife or husband, or a nice housewarming present Budding flower arrangers can tailor the height of the flowers and experiment with different arrangements to make their own unique display The wonderful artificial flowers will never wilt or need to be watered!

item.title: LEGO DUPLO My First Animal Train Toy for Toddlers Creative Bricks Learning Set with Rooster Horse Lamb & Cow Farm Animals Birthday Gift for Nature-Loving Boys & Girls Aged 1.5 Plus Years Old 10412
item.description: You’ve got LEGO DUPLO My First Animal Train Toy for Toddlers Creative Bricks Learning Set with Rooster Horse Lamb & Cow Farm Animals Birthday Gift for Nature-Loving Boys & Girls Aged 1.5 Plus Years Old 10412 at the following link: ℹ️: Train toy for creative play – Toddlers follow the cards to build farm animal toys or use the extra DUPLO bricks for creating their own invention Fine motor skills toys – This train toy for toddlers comes with fun functions that connect the carriages and wobble the rooster’s flexible neck Animal vehicle toy – This LEGO DUPLO My First Animal Train set for ages 18 months and over includes 4 farm animal toys and 3 detachable carriages Birthday gift idea for kids – This hands-on LEGO DUPLO Train set makes a fun birthday gift for toddlers, boys and girls aged 18 months and over Creative Learning toys – Toddlers learn fun colour-matching skills as they pair the animal with its coloured carriage from the train toy 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorian s N-1 Starfighter Building Toy The Book of Boba Fett Gift idea for Kids Boys & Girls Age 9 Plus with Baby Yoda and Droid Figures 75325
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorian s N-1 Starfighter Building Toy The Book of Boba Fett Gift idea for Kids Boys & Girls Age 9 Plus with Baby Yoda and Droid Figures 75325 at the following link: ℹ️: The LEGO Mandalorian buildable toy features a minifigure cockpit, cargo compartment and a spring loaded shooter to protect the crew Includes a LEGO The Mandalorian minifigure with jet pack and darksaber accessories, Peli Motto minifigure with a wrench and a BD Droid figure Clear, illustrated building instructions are included so even LEGO beginners can build this LEGO Star Wars building toy with confidence Kids can place the included Baby Yoda LEGO figure in the starfighters passenger space to experience epic The Book of Boba Fett adventures With this LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorians N-1 Starfighter buildable toy set, youngsters can relive The Book of Boba Fett stories on Tatooine This LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorians N-1 Starfighter buildable toy set makes a great gift for 9 plus year old kids, boys and girls 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Disney and Pixar ‘Up’ House Buildable Toy with Balloons Carl Russell and Dug Figures Collectible Model Set Iconic Gift Idea for Kids Girls & Boys 43217
item.description: You can find LEGO Disney and Pixar ‘Up’ House Buildable Toy with Balloons Carl Russell and Dug Figures Collectible Model Set Iconic Gift Idea for Kids Girls & Boys 43217 with a discount here: ℹ️: The LEGO Builder app guides kids on an adventure of their own, with tools to zoom and rotate 3D models, save sets and monitor progress The Up house model building kit includes a chimney, bedroom, porch and living room with fireplace, plus lots of recognisable film details This LEGO | Disney and Pixar building toy features the house from Up with balloons, Carl and Russell LEGO minifigures plus Dug LEGO dog figure Accessories like the balloon inflator, squirrel figure, wilderness explorer backpack and the adventure book let fans relive their favourite scenes Kids and fans will cherish this LEGO set celebrating Disneys 100th Anniversary as a special Disney gift with its many details and fun build This LEGO | Disney and Pixar house building set is made for endless play sessions or a colourful, eye-catching display in kids’ (or adults’!

item.title: LEGO Orchid Artificial Plant Building Set for Adults with Faux Flowers Home Office Decor Accessory Botanical Collection Gift Idea for Women and Men 10311
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Orchid Artificial Plant Building Set for Adults with Faux Flowers Home Office Decor Accessory Botanical Collection Gift Idea for Women and Men 10311 at the following link: ℹ️: Build your own orchid with this LEGO decorative artificial plant and flowers - a special LEGO set for adults from Botanical Collection Hidden throughout are LEGO elements inspired by other sets, like the minifigure shields & dinosaur tails used to create the sepals and roots Inspired by a real orchid, this stylish model version features 6 large flowers and 2 newly opened flowers, plus the blue fluted vase Rotate the model’s stems, blooms, roots and leaves to create your preferred look, and rebuild the stems to create new flower arrangements This decorative home accessory makes a great alternative to real flowers and is a unique gift for any occasion, such as, a loved ones birthday gift for her or him or get well soon present This LEGO artificial plant set from the Botanical Collection makes a great Christmas gift for plant lovers, anniversary present for a wife or husband, or as a just-because gift for women and men The LEGO designers have worked carefully to create a model that looks as close as possible to the real thing, with amazing attention to detail 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO DUPLO My First Big Feelings & Emotions Customisable Early Development Activity Learning Toys with 23 Coloured Building Bricks and 4 Characters for Toddlers & Kids Aged 18 Months Old Plus 10415
item.description: You can find LEGO DUPLO My First Big Feelings & Emotions Customisable Early Development Activity Learning Toys with 23 Coloured Building Bricks and 4 Characters for Toddlers & Kids Aged 18 Months Old Plus 10415 with a discount here: ℹ️: Toddler learning toys – LEGO DUPLO My First Big Feelings & Emotions has 4 expressive characters to teach kids 18 months plus about different moods Gift for preschool boys and girls – This early development and activity toy Makes a fun birthday gift for toddlers and kids aged 18 months plus Stacking toy – Comes with 23 bricks, including 8 facial expressions and 4 wig bricks so it’s endlessly customisable and keeps playtimes fresh Creative learning toys – By stacking the coloured bricks, kids match or contrast the figures then choose how they feel with the expression bricks Building fine motor skills – The character toys come with coloured wigs in interesting shapes that are fun for curious little fingers to explore 🛒 Buy it!
